category_sources: Official homepage describes calculating broadcast, network, Cisco wildcard mask, host range, subnets, and supernets.
source_facts.description says it calculates network masks from IP addresses.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses ipcalc.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains examples and points back to jodies.de/ipcalc.
source_facts.homepage is the official ipcalc page and explains calculator behavior.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/kjokjo/ipcalc, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes subnetting, netmasks, host ranges, and CIDR notation.
source_facts.description identifies network mask calculation from IP addresses.
